DEFENDANTS STANDISH MANAGEMENT, LLC AND HRE SOLUTIONS DBA ASPEN ASO TO PAY/POST THE $60.00 FEE VIA E-FILING FOR THE SAID ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED. THE COURT ALSO ORDERED THE CASE FOR A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BEFORE THE HONORABLE ANGELA BRADSTREET, DEPT. 624. PARTIES TO CONTACT THE COURT ON THE PROVIDED EMAIL ADDRESS TO SCHEDULE THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
